---
title: "The Hon. Lavinia Talbot"
---

## The Hon. Lavinia Talbot

**Dates:** (1849-1939)

**Maiden name:** (Lyttelton)

### Description

supporter of the education of women

### Letters

- [To Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell, July 31, 1899.](../letters/3414_To_Elizabeth_Harcourt_Mitchell.html)
- Letter from March 25th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
